ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., language acquisition, cognitive development) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "comprehension" INTEGER /* Comprehension score */,
  "production" INTEGER /* Production score */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of assessment */,
  "assessor" TEXT /* Name of the assessor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cognitive_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of cognitive assessment */,
  "score" REAL /* Score on the assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of assessment */,
  "assessor" TEXT /* Name of the assessor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "norming" (
  "norming_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each norming entry */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "norming_date" TEXT /* Date of norming */,
  "norming_value" REAL /* Norming value */,
  "population_description" TEXT /* Description of the population used for norming */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("norming_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_norming_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES language_assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_norming_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES cognitive_assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., data access, data upload) */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset accessed or uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission corresponding to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "role_assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
column_names: Type of study (e.g., language acquisition, cognitive development)
Status of the study (e.g., active, completed)
Unique identifier for each norming entry
Description of the population used for norming
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
Description of the changes in this version
Type of activity (e.g., data access, data upload)
Name of the dataset accessed or uploaded
